channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Senate Democrat defends Vindman against Musk's 'treason' threat
item.description: Sen. Tim Kaine (D-Va.) hit Elon Musk for suggesting in a post on his social platform X on Wednesday that retired Army Lt.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: The Tech Ecosystem Powering Latin America’s Growth
item.description: Even for those of us optimistic about Latin America’s (LATAM) business prospects, the path ahead isn’t without challenges. Political tensions persist. Several major economies in the region continue to seek balance and stability.
item.dc:creator: Nacho De Marco, Fast Company

item.title: The Threat to American Business and Technology Under Trump's Second Presidency
item.description: The potential impact of Donald Trump's policies on immigration, tariffs, and business in the US under his second presidency.
item.dc:creator: Paul Krugman, The Mercury News

item.title: Australia Passes Landmark Law Banning Children Under 16 from Social Media
item.description: Australia's Parliament passes a law banning children under 16 from social media, making platforms liable for fines up to $33 million for systemic failures to prevent underage users.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Canada sues Google over alleged anticompetitive practices in online ads
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Canada's antitrust watchdog said Thursday it is suing Google over alleged anticompetitive conduct in the tech giant’s online advertising business and wants the company to sell off two of its ad tech services and pay a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: The outlook is uncertain for AI regulations as the US government pivots to full Republican control
item.description: The federal government is about to transition from one that prioritized safeguards for artificial intelligence to one more focused on eliminating red tape.
item.dc:creator: Dan Merica And Ali Swenson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: La inteligencia artificial trasciende al espacio
item.description: Investigadores del grupo AIDA procedentes de la Universidad Politécnica de Madrid (UPM) han plantado cara a problemas tradicionales del sector aeroespacial gracias a la innovación tecnológica.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Paso adelante en el desarrollo de los modelos virtuales de las presas de la Confederación Hidrográfica del Guadiana
item.description: La Secretaría de Estado de Medioambiente ha adjudicado a la UTE conformada por Sener y Medical el lote número seis del contrato para la Implementación de Metodología BIM.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Amazon’s VP explains how to protect yourself from holiday impersonation scams
item.description: Amazon becomes a prime target of scammers during the holiday shopping season trying to steal Social Security numbers, bank information and Amazon credentials.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 10 steps to smarter Google account security
item.description: There are important accounts to secure, and then there are important accounts to secure. Your Google account falls into that second category, maybe even with a couple of asterisks and some neon orange highlighting added in for good measure.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Intel’s $7.9B subsidy deal comes at a high price for the chipmaker
item.description: Intel’s $7.86 billion subsidy agreement with the US government imposes strict conditions on the company’s ability to divest stakes in its chipmaking division if the unit becomes independent.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Matt Gaetz is dishing out career advice on Cameo
item.description: After announcing he would not return to Congress, Matt Gaetz is trying out a new career path: making personalized videos on Cameo.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: American Airlines is expanding its airport ‘gate lice’ crackdown
item.description: American Airlines is cracking down on “gate lice” ahead of what’s expected to be a record-setting Thanksgiving travel season. The company is expanding new technology to more than 100 airports in hopes of keeping passengers from attempting to board a flight before their assigned group is called.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Here’s your last-minute guide to holiday social media etiquette
item.description: There are certain social media rules we can all agree on: Ghosting a conversation is impolite, and replying “k” to a text is the equivalent of a backhand slap (violent, wrong, and rude).
item.dc:creator: Steffi Cao, Fast Company

item.title: Fox host: Podcasters like Rogan have 'earned' seats in White House briefing room
item.description: Fox News host Will Cain said popular podcasters like Joe Rogan have “earned” seats in the White House briefing room. When discussing the potential for a shake-up in the James S.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: For Black Friday deals, these 3 sites are all you need
item.description: I’m in my mid-forties. Things are going gray in places and my hips hurt for no reason. And back in my day, Black Friday was one day: the Friday after Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: Australia's social media ban for kids is closer to becoming law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia’s House of Representatives on Wednesday passed a bill that would ban children younger than 16 years old from social media, leaving it to the Senate to finalize the world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Windows Recall: All your privacy questions answered
item.description: Windows Recall is an AI-based feature that will be built into new Copilot+ PCs. Recall takes snapshots of your screen every few seconds and uses that data to make a searchable index of everything you’ve ever done on your PC.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Judge won’t alter Google antitrust trial dates to accommodate Trump DOJ’s proposal
item.description: A US federal judge indicated that the trial addressing the Department of Justice’s proposals to curb Google’s dominance in online search will proceed as scheduled in April 2025, even if DOJ officials under President-elect Donald Trump seek to revise the remedies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Starbucks and other retailers hit with ongoing ransomware attack on software provider
item.description: Major supply-chain software provider Blue Yonder is working to restore its systems after a ransomware attack hit the Panasonic-owned firm last week. Blue Yonder, which counts Starbucks, major U.K.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Federal prosecutors seek records from company that deployed AI weapons scanner on NYC subway
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Federal investigators in New York are seeking records from the manufacturer of an AI-powered weapons scanner that was briefly deployed this summer in New York City’s subway system.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lost access? Here’s how to reclaim your Facebook account
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how to regain your Facebook access if you get hacked or locked out.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: PHP updates DOM API
item.description: PHP 8.4.1, an update to the longstanding server-side web scripting language, has been released with features including an updated DOM API that makes it easier to work with HTML5 documents. Accessible from php.net, PHP 8.4.1 was released November 21.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Cheap Black Friday deals cost to your privacy
item.description: As Black Friday approaches, you should know that retailers often sell consumers' personal information and purchase histories to third parties.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to easily record phone calls on your Android
item.description: Tech guru Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals an easy trick to record a phone conversation on an Android. Once completed, recordings are easy to find.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
